case_title: LI LONG VS. GARMENT NETWORK INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF LONG, LI AS TO DEFENDANT GARMENT NETWORK INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION AKA G.N.T. INC. AND TEAMSHOP JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
